julia_full_audit.PIVOT_EVIDENCE: Content shows clear pivot from tactical SEO to broader AI business strategy and personal branding. Uses 'digital avatar' positioning and focuses on high-level business transformation rather than specific SEO implementation.

julia_full_audit.VERDICT_REASONING: Julia McCoy has clearly pivoted toward general AI business strategy and personal branding rather than deep SEO content production expertise.
